goal: Make edgelesslab.com one of the best sites on the internet

subtasks.title: Deep code audit: verify framer-motion usage, animation deps, bundle analysis
Competitive benchmark against 7 top-tier solo dev sites
P0/P1 optimization plan with actual code patches
P0: Reduce JS bundle (dynamic imports for canvas/canvas-animations)
P1: Self-host Geist fonts to eliminate Google CDN

blocker_log.github_ssh: Cannot clone source — git@github.com:edgeless-ai/edgelesslab.com.git SSH access blocked. HTTPS read-only works (used for audit). Push blocked.
blocker_log.cycle3_findings: framer-motion is a dead dependency (ZERO imports). PostHog already deferred to interaction. Audit's ~1.4MB JS estimate is partially wrong — no framer-motion means actual critical bundle is smaller.
blocker_log.p0_patches_ready: All P0 code patches documented in docs/cycle3-optimization-plan.md. Ready to apply when push access available.

actions: Browser-based performance audit via resource timing API
Measured FCP, DCL, full load, resource breakdown by category
Identified top 3 bottlenecks (JS, RSC prefetches, canvas animations)
cycle_history.result: Full performance baseline documented with 11 optimization recommendations
cycle_history.decision: continue — P0 execution blocked on GitHub SSH access

actions: Deep code audit: verified framer-motion is dead dep (ZERO imports across 70+ source files)
Verified PostHogProvider already defers to first user interaction — not blocking
Verified ScrollReveal uses CSS transitions, not framer-motion (27 lines, lightweight)
Verified hero animations use CSS keyframes with zero JS dependency
Competitive benchmark: edgelesslab.com has fastest TTFB (68ms) and total load (82ms) vs 7 top solo dev sites
Created detailed P0/P1 implementation plan with actual code patches (docs/cycle3-optimization-plan.md)
cycle_history.result: Cycle 2 audit findings revised downward: framer-motion not blocking. Key insight: network performance is already best-in-class (68ms TTFB). The real bottleneck is JS chunk parsing/execute time, not download size. 5 code patches documented and ready.
cycle_history.decision: continue — cycle 4 should apply P0 patches (requires GitHub push access or alternative deploy path)
